title: Tilia-Lite: Daily Pulse Ledger
description: You relight the daily Tilia-Lite lattice by memorizing and replaying leaf-beat sequences before the pattern fades.

howToPlayJson.title: Tilia-Lite: Daily Pulse Ledger
howToPlayJson.objective: Repeat as many daily pulse patterns as possible on a 3x3 leaf lattice, keeping the rhythm and adapting to shifting replay rules before three mistakes end the run.

controls.input: Tap glowing leaf nodes in order
controls.outcome: Rebuilds the shown Tilia-Lite pattern and advances the combo if correct

controls.input: Press and hold a leaf node until its ring closes
controls.outcome: Matches sustained beats for bonus timing points

controls.input: Watch the center sigil flash between rounds
controls.outcome: Tells you the next replay modifier, such as mirrored input or reverse finish

steps: A short daily seed generates a fresh set of pulse patterns on a 3x3 Tilia-Lite leaf grid.
The grid plays a fast audio-visual sequence: leaves blink, stems thrum, and each node has its own tone.
The player immediately replays the pattern from memory by tapping or holding the same nodes in rhythm.
Every few rounds, the center sigil triggers a readable twist for the next pattern, such as replaying the final two beats in reverse or mirr
Perfect replays raise the combo multiplier, speed up the pulse tempo, and lengthen the sequence.
A wrong tap, missed hold, or bad twist read costs a life; losing all three lives ends the run and submits the score to the daily leaderboard
howToPlayJson.scoring: Score 100 points per correct beat, +50 for perfect timing on a beat, and apply a combo multiplier that climbs by 0.25x per flawless pattern up to 4x; surviving twist rounds grants a flat daily bonus, making clean streaks
tips: Learn each node by sound as much as by position; audio is faster than re-reading the grid.
Save focus for twist rounds because they are worth more than normal patterns.
Short accurate runs beat frantic tapping since one mistake breaks the multiplier.
